description_long: This factory building features a multi-level, rectangular structure with a predominantly wooden exterior, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The facade includes a series of large, open bays and platforms, with visible support beams and a small gabled annex on the upper level. The lower levels are partially open, revealing interior platforms, industrial shelving, and a large circular opening that could serve as a tunnel or duct. Metal panels and grates are integrated into the design, especially around the entrances and loading areas, suggesting heavy-duty use. The building lacks ornate detailing, focusing instead on functional elements such as exposed piping, vents, and reinforced corners. The overall design is robust and practical, suitable for manufacturing or heavy industrial operations in an urban setting.
description: A multi-level, wooden industrial factory building with open bays, metal accents, and a robust, utilitarian design. Features include exposed beams, a gabled annex, and a large circular opening on the lower level.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with open bays, a small gabled annex, and visible platforms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large circular opening, exposed piping, and metal paneling on the lower levels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden exterior, minimal openings, and a flat platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the depth of the platforms, the circular tunnel, and interior shelving.
